scope: All flagged vocab in the export, resolved against N3/N4/N5 glossaries + particles + helper-vocab + characters
filtersApplied: notes do not indicate kanji is taught at N3+
broader: kanji-not-taught notes (JLPT N3+, "always written in kana", lesson refs N1-3.X, etc.)

terms.meaning: to drive around / to ride around
to substitute / to replace / to change
to be conceited / to be arrogant
to commute / to go back and forth
feature (e.g. in a magazine) / special edition
to let pass / to pass through
to fit / to suit / to match
to gain weight / to grow fat
to take out / to carry out
to stop / to come to a halt (intransitive)
citizen / national / the people of a nation
to take home / to carry back
